summary: Backend regression test after large-scale code quality refactoring - ALL 19 TESTS PASSED. TypeScript compilation passes with zero errors. All refactored helper modules export correctly. No console.log calls in runtime code.

✓ walletController imports and uses incrementAdminFee/incrementUserWallet (confirmed at lines 21, 935, 941, 1043, 1143)
✓ paymentController imports safeDeleteSubscription and checkKycEnforcement (confirmed at lines 62, 63)
✓ All controllers (wallet, payment, user, admin) import handleControllerError
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full regression test complete after large-scale refactoring. All helper modules correctly extracted and imported. Diagnostics endpoints (tunnel-status, binance-info, email-preview) all working. Backend server starts successfully with healthy status. Note: Backend has hot-reload enabled - test files placed in /app/backend/ will trigger restarts, so tests were moved to /app/tests/.
